meta.title: BeaversLab
meta.description: BeaversLab explores the frontiers of human-AI collaboration, building platforms and AI-native workflows that unite human intuition with machine intelligence—reshaping how we create to build a better world together.

brand.title: BeaversLab
brand.subtitle: Where Human and Agent Create as One.

codex.name: Codex Intel Rebuilder
codex.description: An automated pipeline with daily update checks, providing the latest OpenAI Codex downloads for Intel Mac users. It features seamless runtime porting and integrated browser automation support for a high-performance desktop experience.

crawfish.name: OpenClaw Documentation
crawfish.description: Multi-language documentation center for OpenClaw. It provides comprehensive guides for connecting IM platforms like WhatsApp and Discord to AI coding agents, with automated translation synchronization.

skills.name: Beaver Skills
skills.description: A collection of AI-powered automation workflow skills for tasks like image generation, social media infographics, and automated translation. Designed for seamless integration with AI agents and CLI tools.
